TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Militafad == Militafad:"Ya mipatayay to tamdaw,ala han ningra kiya tangal sapisalisin." Naiti:ya na'ayaway a fafainay mafana' militafad to roma a finacadan.Deng o Tao hananay a finacadan o caay pilitafad to roma a finacadan.Nikasacacaycacay no misapangcahay a finacadan no itiniay i Taywan silisin to Militafad hananay.Na'a:yaw midakaw to lonan ko Taywan tayni tini tita'anan,nika caay ka olah ko Pangcah a taynian no Taywan,sisa caay ka sasokapah ko Pangcah ato Taywan,mahaen ili,marafafitafadan no Pangcah ko Taywan. O romasato, na'a:yaw ano marara'is ko kasafinafinacadan i ,o i tapi'ingan a finacadan ko marafafitafadan.I sa'amisay a Pangcah,o Taroko ato Fakoway hananay a tamdaw ko marafafitafadan no heny. Ira ko talolongay a tatodong no lisin ko Militafad hananay .O sakasaan haw ili,paso'lin ko Taroko to cacay a demak,ano mangalay micomod to loma' no tato'asan itiya i likor no patay i ,yo maoriphen kana caay pilitafad to 'ada ,wa caay papicomoden no to'as kiso tini i loma' no tato'asan. Nika ano makayni i no Pangcahan a rayray,o marasapidipot ato marasapakalemed to niyaro' ko adingo niya tafad.Orasisa ano saadihayen ko tafad no niyaro',o mamadipot , o mamapalemed no kawas ko niyaro'.
S.PHON: == mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ == mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ:"ja mipatajaj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw,a…ĺa ńßan niŇčra kija taŇča…ĺ sapisa…ĺisin." naiti:ja na °ajawaj a fafainaj mafana ° mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ to~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan.…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u tao~u ńßananaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan o~u ¶aaj pi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ to~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan.nikasa ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj no~u misapaŇč ¶ańßaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u itiniaj i tajwan si…ĺisin to~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ ńßananaj.na °a:jaw mi…¨~…ģakaw to~u …ĺo~unan ko~u tajwan tajni tini tita °anan,nika ¶aaj ka o~u…ĺańß ko~u paŇč ¶ańß a tajnian no~u tajwan,sisa ¶aaj ka saso~ukapańß ko~u paŇč ¶ańß ato~u tajwan,mańßa…ôn i…ĺi,marafafitafa…¨~…ģan no~u paŇč ¶ańß ko~u tajwan. o~u ro~umasato~u, na °a:jaw ano~u marara °is ko~u kasafinafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i ,o~u i tapi °iŇčan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~u marafafitafa…¨~…ģan.i sa °amisaj a paŇč ¶ańß,o~u taro~uko~u ato~u fako~uwaj ńßananaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u marafafitafa…¨~…ģan no~u ńß…ônj. ira ko~u ta…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇčaj a tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u …ĺisin ko~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ ńßananaj .o~u sakasaan ńßaw i…ĺi,paso~u °…ĺin ko~u taro~uko~u to~u ¶a ¶aj a …¨~…ģ…ômak,ano~u maŇča…ĺaj mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u tato~u °asan itija i …ĺiko~ur no~u pataj i ,jo~u mao~uripńß…ôn kana ¶aaj pi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ to~u °a…¨~…ģa ,wa ¶aaj papi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ…ôn no~u to~u °as kiso~u tini i …ĺo~uma ° no~u tato~u °asan. nika ano~u makajni i no~u paŇč ¶ańßan a rajraj,o~u marasapi…¨~…ģipo~ut ato~u marasapaka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u nijaro~u ° ko~u a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u nija tafa…¨~…ģ.o~urasisa ano~u saa…¨~…ģińßaj…ôn ko~u tafa…¨~…ģ no~u nijaro~u °,o~u mama…¨~…ģipo~ut , o~u mamapa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ no~u kawas ko~u nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: == Militafad == Militafad:"Ya mipatayay to tamdaw,ala han ningra kiya tangal sapisalisin." Naiti:ya na'ayaway a fafainay mafana' militafad to roma a finacadan.Deng o Tao hananay a finacadan o caay pilitafad to roma a finacadan.Nikasacacaycacay no misapangcahay a finacadan no itiniay i Taywan silisin to Militafad hananay.Na'a:yaw midakaw to lonan ko Taywan tayni tini tita'anan,nika caay ka olah ko Pangcah a taynian no Taywan,sisa caay ka sasokapah ko Pangcah ato Taywan,mahaen ili,marafafitafadan no Pangcah ko Taywan. O romasato, na'a:yaw ano marara'is ko kasafinafinacadan i ,o i tapi'ingan a finacadan ko marafafitafadan.I sa'amisay a Pangcah,o Taroko ato Fakoway hananay a tamdaw ko marafafitafadan no heny. Ira ko talolongay a tatodong no lisin ko Militafad hananay .O sakasaan haw ili,paso'lin ko Taroko to cacay a demak,ano mangalay micomod to loma' no tato'asan itiya i likor no patay i ,yo maoriphen kana caay pilitafad to 'ada ,wa caay papicomoden no to'as kiso tini i loma' no tato'asan. Nika ano makayni i no Pangcahan a rayray,o marasapidipot ato marasapakalemed to niyaro' ko adingo niya tafad.Orasisa ano saadihayen ko tafad no niyaro',o mamadipot , o mamapalemed no kawas ko niyaro'.
S.PHON: == mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ == mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ:"ja mipatajaj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw,a…ĺa ńßan niŇčra kija taŇča…ĺ sapisa…ĺisin." naiti:ja na °ajawaj a fafainaj mafana ° mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ to~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan.…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u tao~u ńßananaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan o~u ¶aaj pi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ to~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan.nikasa ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj no~u misapaŇč ¶ańßaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u itiniaj i tajwan si…ĺisin to~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ ńßananaj.na °a:jaw mi…¨~…ģakaw to~u …ĺo~unan ko~u tajwan tajni tini tita °anan,nika ¶aaj ka o~u…ĺańß ko~u paŇč ¶ańß a tajnian no~u tajwan,sisa ¶aaj ka saso~ukapańß ko~u paŇč ¶ańß ato~u tajwan,mańßa…ôn i…ĺi,marafafitafa…¨~…ģan no~u paŇč ¶ańß ko~u tajwan. o~u ro~umasato~u, na °a:jaw ano~u marara °is ko~u kasafinafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i ,o~u i tapi °iŇčan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ko~u marafafitafa…¨~…ģan.i sa °amisaj a paŇč ¶ańß,o~u taro~uko~u ato~u fako~uwaj ńßananaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u marafafitafa…¨~…ģan no~u ńß…ônj. ira ko~u ta…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇčaj a tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u …ĺisin ko~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ ńßananaj .o~u sakasaan ńßaw i…ĺi,paso~u °…ĺin ko~u taro~uko~u to~u ¶a ¶aj a …¨~…ģ…ômak,ano~u maŇča…ĺaj mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u tato~u °asan itija i …ĺiko~ur no~u pataj i ,jo~u mao~uripńß…ôn kana ¶aaj pi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ to~u °a…¨~…ģa ,wa ¶aaj papi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ…ôn no~u to~u °as kiso~u tini i …ĺo~uma ° no~u tato~u °asan. nika ano~u makajni i no~u paŇč ¶ańßan a rajraj,o~u marasapi…¨~…ģipo~ut ato~u marasapaka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u nijaro~u ° ko~u a…¨~…ģiŇčo~u nija tafa…¨~…ģ.o~urasisa ano~u saa…¨~…ģińßaj…ôn ko~u tafa…¨~…ģ no~u nijaro~u °,o~u mama…¨~…ģipo~ut , o~u mamapa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ no~u kawas ko~u nijaro~u °.
